inputs.label: Argument (x)
inputs.businessContext: The value for which the logarithm is calculated. Must be > 0.

businessContext_i18n.en: The value for which the logarithm is calculated. Must be > 0.

inputs.label: Log Base (b)
inputs.businessContext: The base of the logarithm. Common bases: 10, e (Math.E), 2. Must be > 0 and ≠ 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: The base of the logarithm. Common bases: 10, e (Math.E), 2. Must be > 0 and ≠ 1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Logaritmanın tabanı. Yaygın tabanlar: 10, e (Math.E), 2. > 0 ve ≠ 1 olmalıdır.

inputs.label: Multiplier (m)
inputs.businessContext: Scaling factor applied after taking the logarithm, e.g., 20 for dB conversion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Scaling factor applied after taking the logarithm, e.g., 20 for dB conversion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Logaritma alındıktan sonra uygulanan ölçekleme faktörü, örn. dB dönüşümü için 20.

inputs.label: Offset (c)
inputs.businessContext: Constant added after multiplication, used in linear calibration or zero adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Constant added after multiplication, used in linear calibration or zero adjustment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çarpma işleminden sonra eklenen sabit, doğrusal kalibrasyon veya sıfır ayarında kullanılır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
